name: cannibal.live_world_day_smoke_pressure_mcw
description: Scenario 1 for cannibal camp night-raid live matrix: daytime smoke/light near the McWilliams/Basecamp footing should create cannibal scout/stalk/dispatch pressure through the real live signal and local-gate path, not instant combat or bandit shakedown UI. The fixture uses a reviewer-visible relabeled camp-shaped special because the source McWilliams world has no natural cannibal_camp placement; it also sets the save to a daylight 30-minute dispatch cadence boundary so one proven player action can exercise the live dispatch path instead of waiting through a fragile long-wait UI.

steps.label: post_load_day_smoke_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for McWilliams cannibal day-smoke fixture; this is startup/load evidence plus before-action screen proof, not feature closure by itself
steps.failure_rule: If the gameplay screen is not visible after load, later smoke/dispatch artifacts cannot be credited.

steps.label: pass_one_turn_on_daylight_dispatch_boundary
steps.expected_visible_fact: one player pass-turn input has completed on the daylight smoke fixture; feature credit depends on the same-run debug artifact showing cannibal_camp local_gate from live smoke with shakedown=no and combat_forward=no
steps.failure_rule: If the pass-turn input is unproven or the same-run artifact lacks the cannibal local-gate line, this scenario is not product proof.

evidence_contract.claim: day smoke/light creates cannibal scout/stalk/dispatch pressure, not instant combat
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for cannibal behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No feature-proof credit if startup/load, pass-turn ledger, smoke signal, cannibal site match, local_gate report, or non-combat/non-shakedown artifact is missing or non-green.
